prompt:
You are a B2B prospecting analyst for a web agency. Analyze this locksmith's contact/emergency page.

Critical question: can a locked-out person get help within 30 seconds of landing on this page?

HOT LEAD signals:
- Phone number not prominent or not click-to-call
- No service area map or list
- Contact form as primary contact method (useless in emergency)
- No response time stated
- No after-hours information

COLD LEAD signals:
- Giant click-to-call button
- Service area map with coverage zones
- Response time guarantee ("30 min or less")
- 24/7 clearly stated with emergency number
- Live chat
- WhatsApp/text option
- Address with embedded map

Return each record as:
{
  "url": "<page url>",
  "pageName": "<short name>",
  "summary": "<1-2 sentence overview of contact/emergency access>",
  "opportunityScore": "<1-10, higher = harder to reach = better lead>",
  "hasClickToCall": true/false,
  "hasServiceAreaMap": true/false,
  "hasResponseTime": true/false,
  "has24x7Info": true/false,
  "hasLiveChat": true/false,
  "topOpportunity": "<what a web agency could sell here>",
  "notes": "<one sentence prospecting assessment>"
}

---
You are analyzing web pages for the category described above.
For each page provided below, extract one record.
Follow the JSON schema from the category description exactly.

## Required fields (always include)
- "url": the page URL
- "pageName": short human-readable page name
- "summary": 1-2 sentence plain-language overview

## Field naming conventions (follow strictly)
- Scores: name ends with "Score", value is a number 1-10 (e.g. "conversionScore": 7)
- Booleans: name starts with "has"/"is" or ends with "Visible" (e.g. "pricingVisible": true)
- Short text: "notes", "description" — 1-2 sentences max
- Tags/lists: arrays of short strings (e.g. "classStyles": ["Hatha", "Vinyasa"])
- Plain strings: everything else (e.g. "price": "€15 drop-in")

Return a JSON object: { "records": [<one record per page>] }.
No markdown, no code fences.
response:
{
  "records": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.london-locksmiths.com/contact-london-locksmiths.htm",
      "pageName": "Contact London Locksmiths",
      "summary": "The page provides a physical address, email, freephone and mobile number, plus a small click-to-call image button and a contact enquiry form. Core emergency signals like response time, 24/7 statement, service area map, live chat, or WhatsApp are entirely absent.",
      "opportunityScore": 7,
      "hasClickToCall": true,
      "hasServiceAreaMap": false,
      "hasResponseTime": false,
      "has24x7Info": false,
      "hasLiveChat": false,
      "topOpportunity": "Full emergency landing page redesign: prominent 24/7 badge, response time guarantee, interactive service area map, WhatsApp/text CTA, and removal of the form as the fallback contact method.",
      "notes": "The click-to-call button exists but is a small GIF image with no size or urgency hierarchy; the absence of 24/7 info, response time, and a service map makes this a weak emergency page and a solid mid-tier prospect for a conversion-focused redesign."
    }
  ]
}
